subject: Update inventory and sch charts
commit_message:
Update inventory and sch charts

* Switch inventory to serve over https
* Have SCH use https when making calls to inventory

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-913
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1597
Signed-off-by: Michael Hwang <mhwang@research.att.com>
Change-Id: Id2dc3b2d6f58d1cbfa56f7eeb32e9b3ddba8b16d

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained CI build failure on some jobs.
Jobs with issue:
- Step: apps_deploy 
  * Project: oom 
  * Status: failed 
  * Pipeline: 'https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//pipelines/72337923' 
  * API pipeline url: 'https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/6550110/pipelines/72337923' 
  * Failed jobs: 
  *   - id: 256834720 
  *     name: clean/clean 
  *     status: failed 
  *     duration: 94.166827 
  *     link: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//-/jobs/256834720 
  *   - id: 256835631 
  *     name: clean/clean 
  *     status: failed 
  *     duration: 87.547117 
  *     link: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//-/jobs/256835631

Patch Set 1:

TEST RESULTS FOR OOM/DCAE (staging branch)
2019-07-25
Partial deployment of ONAP (aaf, cassandra, consul, dcaegen2, dmaap, log, msb, policy, robot, sdc)

NOTE: The DCAE service change handler does not get past the init stage due to
problems with SDC (cassandra and be configuration jobs failing)
